ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* Unique FIPS code identifier for the county */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code identifier corresponding to the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded data */,
  "r_lm" REAL /* Linear regression value for the county */,
  "predicted_lm" REAL /* Predicted linear regression value */,
  "r_slm" REAL /* Seasonal linear regression value */,
  "predicted_slm" REAL /* Predicted seasonal linear regression value */,
  "days_from_start" INTEGER /* Days from the start of the data collection period */,
  "log_rolled_cases" REAL /* Log of rolled cases for the given day */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported in the county on the given date */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported in the county on the given date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the given date */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per 100,000 people */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code identifier for the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction is made */,
  "tau_hat" REAL /* Estimated tau value for the prediction */,
  "predicted_grf_future_0" REAL /* Predicted cases for the future period using GRF model (first forecast) */,
  "predicted_grf_future_last" REAL /* Predicted cases for the future period using GRF model (last forecast) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the predicted cases */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for prediction (e.g., GRF, ARIMA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code identifier for the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date corresponding to the metrics */,
  "D_r_lm" REAL /* Difference in linear regression metrics */,
  "D_r_slm" REAL /* Difference in seasonal linear regression metrics */,
  "D_tau_hat" REAL /* Difference in tau value */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for metrics */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "precision_score" REAL /* Precision score of the model */,
  "recall_score" REAL /* Recall score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "baseline_metrics" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code identifier for the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date corresponding to the metrics */,
  "B_D_r_lm" REAL /* Baseline difference in linear regression metrics */,
  "B_D_r_slm" REAL /* Baseline difference in seasonal linear regression metrics */,
  "B_D_tau_hat" REAL /* Baseline difference in tau value */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for baseline metrics */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the baseline model */,
  "precision_score" REAL /* Precision score of the baseline model */,
  "recall_score" REAL /* Recall score of the baseline model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
